TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Toweng si mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 969.43 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 871.9 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.77 km²), 4,172 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,320 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,872 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun, Hla'aluwa ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Toweng si ays psgayun 8 ru 14 alang. 14 alang hani ga, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .
S.PHON: toweŋ s~ɕi mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na βunun, ħlaʔaluwa ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu toweŋ s~ɕi ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun , ħus~ɕi*a , tamaħu , s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*/s~ɕuluŋan , r*ħl*ʦ~ʨ*/ħais~ɕiŋ , s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi , kal***ŋa/ŋani , taŋuħla/*inkam , mizuħu , ua-as~ɕik , la*ulan , *akus~ɕ , mas~ɕuħuaz , *ai-ni .
S.FORM: Toweng si mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 969.43 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 871.9 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.77 km²), 4,172 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,320 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,872 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun, Hla'aluwa ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Toweng si ays psgayun 8 ru 14 alang. 14 alang hani ga, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .
